configurations.name: llm-derby
runtimeArgs: import os;os.chdir('/tmp/llm-derby');import http.server as h,socketserver as s;d=type('H',(h.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler,),{'extensions_map':{'.html':'text/html','.css':'text/css','.js':'application/javascript','.json':'application/json','.png':'image/png','':'application/octet-stream'}});t=s.TCPServer(('',3000),d);print('Serving on 3000',flush=True);t.serve_forever()
